reviews.review_description: This app asks for your login info even though you haven't registered yet. There is no way of accessing this app at all. Very disappointed.
This app asks for your login info even though you haven't registered yet. There is no way of accessing this app at all. Very disappointed.

reviews.review_title: Where do you get an account?
reviews.review_description: I've tried  every username/password combo I can think of, and can't get into the app to even try it. Nowhere to create an account. Too bad as I was really looking forward to trying it but I  guess I'll have to return it ☹️

reviews.review_title: No way to get into the app
reviews.review_description: Requires a username and password but there's no place to create one.
